text: Many snowboarders are descending a small snowy hill.
A captive elephant bellows from behind the fence.
A view of produce stand with cabbage, lettuce, beets, and broccoli.
A  bunch of kites flying at the beach.
A set of stairs has a window underneath it.
A bicyclist peddling down a busy city street.
two men in suits cutting a wedding cake.
A woman with a large lei walks away smiling from an elephant ride.
Passengers board a public bus in a busy city.
A couple of brown cows laying on top of a field.
